posts.body: Beta smoke post with uploaded media
Who is online in Muenchen tonight? Looking for bold stories and honest replies.
Confession: I earn more from private attention than from my office job.
Platform note: city-only launch is live, explorer remains read-only until adult verification.

replies.body: I am here. Keep it anonymous and direct.
This is exactly why creator payouts need proper review and safety checks.
